steps.title: Find the growth factor
steps.content:
Let $k=b^{1/n}$. Then $f(x)=ab^{x/n}$ becomes $f(x)=ak^x$. Use the two known values as a ratio:
$$\frac{f(8)}{f(5)}=\frac{189}{7}=27$$
The input increased by $3$, so $k^3=27$ and $k=3$.

steps.title: Multiply from the nearer known value
steps.content:
From $x=8$ to $x=10$ is two unit steps, so multiply by the per-step factor twice:
$$f(10)=189\cdot 3^2=189\cdot 9=1701$$
The answer is 1701.
